items.title: 4 Reasons to Roll Your Covered Call Option and Keep Your Income Strategy Alive
items.description: Options expert Gavin McMaster explains when and why covered call traders should roll their positions.

items.description: RiverPark highlights Alphabet, Apple, and Nvidia as top Q3 performers, while ISRG, NFLX, and NOW faced headwinds. See what drove gains and setbacks.

items.title: The Dow Heads for Another Record. Big Tech Is Dragging on the S&P 500, Nasdaq.
items.description: The Dow was cruising to its first close north of 48,000 on Wednesday, but Magnificent Seven stocks were a big drag on the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite.  The blue-chip index was up 400 points, or 0.8%, and on pace to build on yesterday’s closing high.  The S&P 500 was up just 0.1%.
